alter table [PSZ_Buchungen laufen Status]
add [FAPlannungAgent laüft] bit default 0

alter table [PSZ_Buchungen laufen Status]
add [UBGPlannungAgent laüft] bit default 0

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[FAPlanning](
	[Artikel-Nr] [int] NULL,
	[Artikelnummer] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[UBG] [bit] NULL,
	[Year] [int] NULL,
	[Kw] [int] NULL,
	[SumProd] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[SumNeeds] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[SumProdCumul] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[SumNeedsCumul] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[Prio] [int] NULL,
	[PosOrder] [int] NULL,
	[LeadOrder] [int] NULL,
	[ProductionPlace] [int] NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[UBGPlannung](
	[Artikel-Nr] [int] NULL,
	[Artikelnummer] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[UBG] [bit] NULL,
	[Year] [int] NULL,
	[Kw] [int] NULL,
	[SumProd] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[SumNeeds] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[SumProdCumul] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[SumNeedsCumul] [decimal](20, 7) NULL,
	[Prio] [int] NULL,
	[PosOrder] [int] NULL,
	[LeadOrder] [int] NULL,
	[ProductionPlace] [int] NULL,
)
